ns0:entry.ns0:title: Johnshall/Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Johnshall/Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
Language: unknown
提供多款 Shadowrocket 规则，拥有强劲的广告过滤功能。每日 8 时重新构建规则。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
Language: unknown
The 500 AI Agents Projects is a curated collection of AI agent use cases across various industries. It showcases practical applications and provides links to open-source projects for implementation, illustrating how AI agents are transforming sectors such as healthcare, finance, education, retail, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
Language: unknown
A curated list of free courses with certifications. Also available at https://free-certifications.com/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
Language: unknown
FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
